{{Quote|Citizen, move along. We're transferring precious cargo here. Nothing to be concerned about.|Dreryn, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:OD" />}}
'''Dreryn''' was a [[Arcona/Legends|Arcona]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], Dreryn worked on [[Tansarii Point Station/Legends|Tansarii Point Station]], a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] near the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]], in the [[Bright Jewel system/Legends|Bright Jewel system]].<ref name="SWG:OD" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> he secretly supervised the transport of a valuable shipment,<ref name="SWG:OD" /> likely a cargo stolen from an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] ship in transit to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="SWG:DfI">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Entertainer|Dancing for Information|Tansarii Point Station}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Dreryn appeared as a non-player character in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:OD" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Dreryn was added to the game as part of the "[[W:c:swg:New Player Tutorial|New Player Tutorial]],"<ref name="SWG:OD" /> introduced with the release of the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 25 Notes for November 15, 2005|Publish 25]]," a.k.a. the "[[W:c:swg:New Game Enhancements|New Game Enhancements]]," on [[November 15]], [[2005]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish Archive 2005">{{SonyCite|url=players/content.vm?id=64886&resource=publish|text=Publish Archive 2005}}</ref> Unused game files indicated that Officer Dreryn was intended to be involved in one of [[Rydel Delan]]'s cut quests.<ref>{{GalaxiesNGE}} — npe_brawler_3.stf</ref>
